title: Place value tables
description: Use place value tables to identify value of digits in a number.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following place value tables shows $7{,}082$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: $7{,}082$ = $\tealD{7 \text{ thousands}}$ + $0\text{ hundreds}$ + $\purpleC{8\text{ tens}}$ + $\maroonD{2\text{ ones}}$

Now, let's fill in $\tealD{7{,}000}+\purpleC{80}+\maroonD{2}$ on the place value chart.

Thousands | Hundreds | Tens |  Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$\tealD{7}$ |$0$ | $\purpleC8$ | $\maroonD2$

Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
 :-: | :-: | :-: |:-:
$7$ | $0$ | $8$ | $2$

choices.content:
Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
 :-: | :-: | :-: |:-:
$7$ | $0$ | $8$ | $2$

Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
 :-: | :-: | :-: |:-:
$7$ | $8$ | $2$ | $0$

assessment_items.question_content:

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: $3{,}204$ = $\tealD{3 \text{ thousands}}$ + $\goldD{2 \text{ hundreds}}$ + $0\text{ tens}$ + $\maroonD{4\text{ ones}}$

Now, let's fill in $\tealD{3{,}000}+\goldD{200}+\maroonD{4}$ on the place value chart.

Thousands | Hundreds | Tens |  Ones

Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones

$3$ | $2$ | $0$ | $4$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following place value tables shows $15{,}690$?**

hints: $15{,}690$ = $0 \text{ hundred thousands} + \redD{1 \text{ ten thousand}}$ + $\tealD{5 \text{ thousands}}$ + $\goldD{6 \text{ hundreds}}$ + $\purpleD{9\text{ tens}}$ + $0 \text{ ones}$

Now, let's fill in $\redD{10{,}000}+\tealD{5{,}000}+\goldD{600}+\purpleD{90}$ on the place value chart.

Ten thousands | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
 :-: | :-: | :-: |:-: |:-:

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of the following place value tables shows $277{,}451$?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: $277{,}451$ = $\blueD{2 \text{ hundred thousands}} +\redD{7 \text{ ten thousands}}$ + $\tealD{7 \text{ thousands}}$ + $\goldD{4 \text{ hundreds}}$ + $\purpleC{5\text{ tens}}$ + $\maroonD{1 \text{ one}}$

Now, let's fill in $\blueD{200{,}000}+\redD{70{,}000}+\tealD{7{,}000}+\goldD{400}+\purpleD{50}+\maroonD{1}$ on the place value chart.

Hundred thousands | Ten thousands | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
 :-: | :-: | :-: |:-: |:-: |:-:
$\blueD{2}$ | $\redD{7}$ | $\tealD{7}$ | $\goldD{4}$ | $\purpleD{5}$ | $\maroonD{1}$

Hundred thousands | Ten thousands | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
 :-: | :-: | :-: |:-: |:-: |:-:
$2$ | $7$ | $7$ | $4$ | $5$ | $1$

choices.content:
Hundred thousands | Ten thousands | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones

Ten thousands | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
 :-: | :-: | :-: |:-: |:-:

Ten thousands | Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
 :-: | :-: | :-: |:-: |:-: 
$2$ | $7$ | $7$ | $5$ | $1$

assessment_items.question_content:
**Use the place value chart to write $60{,}229$.**  
*Enter a $1$-digit number in each box of the place value chart.*  

Ten thousands| Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |:-: | :-: |
[[☃ numeric-input 1]] | [[☃ numeric-input 2]] | [[☃ numeric-input 3]] | [[☃ numeric-input 4]] | [[☃ numeric-input 5]]
hints: $60{,}229$ = $\goldD{6\text{ ten thousands}}$ + $0 \text{ thousands}$ + $\blueD{2\text{ hundreds}}$ + $\purpleC{2\text{ tens}}$ + $\maroonD{9\text{ ones}}$

Now, let's fill in $\goldD{60{,}000}+\blueD{200}+\purpleC{20}+\maroonD{9}$ on the place value chart.

Ten thousands |Thousands | Hundreds | Tens |  Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-:
$\goldD6$ | $0$ | $\blueD2$ | $\purpleC2$ | $\maroonD9$

Ten thousands| Thousands | Hundreds | Tens | Ones
:-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |:-: | :-: |
$6$ | $0$ | $2$ |$2$ | $9$
